title: IonMich/batch-doc-vqa
summary: Ask a question about a document collection and extract structured responses

title: wlsdks/muse-agent
summary: An AI you live with, not one you visit. A little bluebird settles into your computer — keeps your unfinished threads, learns your rhythms, and gets better at helping the longer you're together. Local-first: your life stays on your machine.

title: ppeck1/project-atlas
summary: Local-first personal project management for Windows. What am I carrying, what is blocked, what needs action today?

title: matthewdcage/llm-swarm-router
summary: Run the LLM Swarm Router on machines to distribute Local Ai to the Swarm - More Machines - MORE SPEED

title: browseros-ai/BrowserOS
summary: 🌐 The open-source Agentic browser; alternative to ChatGPT Atlas, Perplexity Comet, Dia.

title: crogers2287/cfrproxy
summary: Universal LLM proxy in a single Go binary — one endpoint for every model. Route Claude Code / Codex / OpenCode / any tool to any provider (cloud, OAuth subs, or local) with cross-dialect translation, auto-routing, failover, and a live dashboard.

title: tylerjrbuell/reactive-agents-ts
summary: A composable TypeScript framework for building reliable LLM agents on a harness you fully control. The same code runs the agent loop on every model tier — local 4B to frontier — with tool-call healing, verification, and durable crash-resume, on a typed 12-phase engine where every step emits an event you can hook into. Effect-TS, MCP-native, MIT.

title: aestheticfunction/dspack-studio
summary: The flagship experience for the open AI-native frontend ecosystem: an AI agent builds interfaces under a design-system contract, streamed over AG-UI as A2UI surfaces, rendered with Astryx. Every gate, repair, and audit is inspectable.

title: Mobile-Artificial-Intelligence/maid
summary: Maid is a free and open source application for interfacing with llama.cpp models locally, and with Anthropic, DeepSeek, Ollama, Mistral and OpenAI models remotely.

title: tobocop2/lilbee
summary: The whole local AI stack in one executable: it runs and manages local AI models across every GPU, and it's a search engine you can talk to, with cited answers from your files, code, and the web. MCP server for coding agents, web crawler, TUI, CLI, REST API, Python library. No Ollama or LM Studio needed, works with both.

title: Tim-Butterfield/ollama-chat-tauri
summary: Local GUI for Ollama AI/LLM using React.js + Tauri/Rust

title: EnchanTheory/Enchan-CLI
summary: Privacy-first local AI built around a stable 2B / 4GB model and responsive CPU use.

title: raro42/mac-stats
summary: Menu-bar system monitor for Apple Silicon (optional local AI agent). Rust + Tauri. No cloud telemetry.

title: Bike4Mind/bike4mind
summary: The open-core AI workbench — notebooks, agents, RAG, voice, and images across any model: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, or local via Ollama/vLLM. BSL 1.1,  auto-converting to Apache-2.0 on a two-year clock. Your AI keeps running when theirs doesn't.

title: vudang4494/VRAG
summary: Vector-Centric Hybrid GraphRAG — 100% local on Apple Silicon. Qdrant (6 dense views + BM25) + Neo4j KG (NPMI de-hub, entity resolution) + Ollama gemma4:e4b + GLiNER. LazyGraphRAG global query (gated). FastAPI.

title: yuma-shintani/ollama-model-library
summary: Get Ollama models from the Ollama library website (https://ollama.com/library) in JSON format.

title: AashishH15/Lexicon
summary: A local-first, offline AI writing assistant. Grammar, rewriting & tone entirely on your machine.

title: harshadap-pixel/crucible
summary: Reads your codebase, detects your RAG pipeline, and auto-generates the eval tests most likely to break it.

title: daya7781r/miii-cli-offline-coder
